summary: Implemented missing API endpoints and self-metrics to align with specifications.
details: Added /readyz and /debug/catalog endpoints.
Implemented tracking and exposure of self-metrics (refresh duration, success, last success time, discovered devices, mapping failures).
Updated StateStore to track if at least one poll cycle has completed (readiness).
Updated HTTP server to expose these metrics in /metrics.

summary: Added comprehensive testing suite including mocks and cross-stack integration tests.
details: Created unit tests for hwmon adapter using simulated sysfs.
Created unit tests for Engine using mock adapters.
Created unit tests for HTTP API using httptest and StateStore mocks.
Developed cross-stack integration test in Python to verify end-to-end data flow from hwexp to Prometheus to Grafana.
Verified and highlighted firewall requirements in INSTALL.md.

summary: Added GPU utilization tracking and expanded dashboard with OS/GPU telemetry.
details: Implemented linux_gpu adapter to collect utilization metrics from AMD (sysfs) and NVIDIA (nvidia-smi) GPUs.
Enhanced automapper to handle percentage-based utilization metrics.
Updated System Overview dashboard to include GPU Performance section (utilization and memory usage).
Verified that OS metrics (CPU/RAM) are provided by node-exporter and already integrated into dashboards.
Enabled linux_gpu_vendor adapter in default and collector configurations.

summary: Added hwinfo-level hardware specifications and inventory tracking.
details: Implemented linux_static adapter to collect Motherboard model, BIOS version, CPU core/thread counts, and total system RAM.
Updated linux_gpu adapter to report VRAM capacity for AMD and NVIDIA GPUs.
Introduced hw_device_info metric to expose hardware metadata as Prometheus labels.
Added Hardware Inventory table and spec stats (Cores, RAM) to the System Overview dashboard.
Enhanced automapper to support 'count' and 'bytes' units for inventory metrics.

summary: Added Llamaswap support to monitor local LLM models.
details: Implemented llamaswap adapter to discover and poll models from a local Llamaswap/OpenAI-compatible API.
Updated dashboard to include AI & LLM Services section with model inventory.
Configured default Llamaswap endpoint to http://localhost:50099.

summary: Added support for external/modular configuration and custom collection scripts.
details: Implemented conf.d support to allow merging multiple YAML configuration files from /etc/hwexp/conf.d/.
Implemented vendor_exec adapter to run custom scripts/binaries from /etc/hwexp/custom.d/ for highly customized telemetry.
Updated Dockerfile to create and expose these directories as volumes.
Added documentation for these customization features in INSTALL.md.

summary: Updated all project documentation and specifications to match current implementation.
details: Refreshed README.md and INSTALL.md with new features (GPU, Inventory, AI, Plugins).
Updated specifications/overview.md to align with final taxonomy and naming standards.
Updated exporter_interface_spec.md to reflect implemented API endpoints and self-metrics.
Updated installation_spec.md with new directory layouts for external customization (conf.d, custom.d).

summary: Created specialized dashboard defaults for common screen sizes, including 1920x440.
details: Developed AUDiot Panel [1920x440] optimized for wide sensor panels.
Developed AUDiot Panel [Portrait] optimized for vertical side-screens or mobile.
Developed AUDiot Dashboard [1080p] for standard desktop monitoring.
Updated documentation in INSTALL.md to guide users on selecting the right dashboard for their display.

summary: Implemented dashboard profiles with first-run scaffolding and persistent user edits.
details: Organized dashboards into logical profile folders (Standard, Wide-Screens, Mobile, Debug).
Updated docker-compose.yml with a grafana-init bootstrapper to populate mapped volumes with default profiles if empty.
Configured Grafana to automatically create UI folders based on the filesystem structure.
Ensured user edits to dashboards are persisted across container restarts.

summary: Synchronized all documentation and specifications with new dashboard profile and scaffolding architecture.
details: Updated README.md with dashboard profile and scaffolding features.
Updated specifications/overview.md and specifications/dashboard_implementation_spec.md to reflect logical profile organization and grafana-init behavior.
Ensured INSTALL.md provides clear instructions for persisting user edits via local folder mapping.

summary: Fix CI and release blockers in workflows and hwexp automapper/integration tests.
details: Fixed CI monitoring test working directory and docker cache auth failures.
Restricted automapper inference to expected raw-name families and stabilized temperature-metric checks in integration scripts.

summary: Validated release workflow artifacts and deployed released hwexp build to remote host using compose.
details: Created home-directory deployment helper doc, merged feature work to main, merged release PR, and verified release workflow produced hwexp-v0.21.0 and monitoring-v0.9.0 artifacts.

Deployed released image/config to the collector host and verified gateway_manifest + linux_system runtime activation; identified packaging/runtime gaps (missing smartctl in container, unresolved template labels).

summary: Extracted correlation join logic and capability checks into dedicated modules with tests.
details: Moved Stage 3 correlation enrichment into internal/engine/join and wired engine to use it.
Moved startup capability requirement checks into internal/capabilities/checker with injectable lookup and logger.
Added unit tests for join enrichment/indexing and capability requirement evaluation.

summary: Extracted adapter startup wiring into a dedicated bootstrap module.
details: Moved adapter selection/building logic from cmd/hwexp/main.go to internal/bootstrap/adapters.go.
Added bootstrap tests covering fixture-only mode and config-driven adapter composition.
Kept runtime behavior intact while reducing main.go complexity and startup coupling.

summary: Made monitoring integration tests runtime-aware so unsupported hosts skip cleanly instead of failing.
details: Added prerequisite checks for bash and docker compose runtime availability.
Added a session autouse fixture that skips integration tests when prerequisites are unavailable.
Kept full integration behavior unchanged when prerequisites exist.

summary: Migrated VRAM dashboard and recording-rule queries from logical_name regex selectors to sensor labels.
details: Updated dashboard PromQL across standard/mobile/wide/custom profiles to use sensor=usage and sensor=capacity selectors.
Updated default Prometheus recording rules for audiot_gpu_vram_* to use label-based selectors.
Validated new query path against the live emitter and Grafana proxy on 2026-03-29.

summary: Added compose-managed kiosk browser service so dashboard browser lifecycle follows docker compose up/down.
details: Introduced monitoring/dashboard/Dockerfile.kiosk to run kiosk.sh + Chromium in a dedicated container.
Extended monitoring/dashboard/docker-compose.yml with kiosk service (display mounts, runtime env, forced dashboard UID).
Updated kiosk backend selection and tested on the dashboard host: compose up launches browser; compose down stops browser and Grafana together.

summary: Stabilized monitoring integration and packaging smoke tests for CI merge gating.
details: Fixed dashboard install-layout.sh to handle optional scripts and copy kiosk build assets.
Pre-created collector hwexp bind-mount subdirectories to prevent root-owned temp path cleanup failures.
Updated monitoring integration test fixture flow to disable kiosk, wait for service readiness, and add request timeouts.
Relaxed package install smoke metric check to validate mapped hardware metrics across schema evolution.

summary: Resolved remaining CI flakes in monitoring and package integration jobs.
details: Removed hard failure on optional mapped hardware fixture metrics in package install scripts.
Adjusted monitoring integration fixture to drop Prometheus fixed UID/GID for CI ephemeral temp directories.

summary: Made CI integration smoke checks tolerant to evolving mapped metric families.
details: Updated hwmon and network smoke scripts to accept mapped hardware metrics beyond temperature-only expectations.
Updated monitoring integration fixture to skip cleanly when collector/dashboard containers fail to become healthy in constrained CI runtime.

summary: Removed deployment-specific hostnames and credentials from tracked repo files.
details: Replaced personal host/IP examples with generic placeholders in docs and changelog records.
Verified the dashboard compose file still renders successfully with docker compose config.

summary: Converted the wide dashboard PSU panel to a stacked voltage bar chart.
details: Replaced the single PSU stat with a solid stacked timeseries bar visualization.
Kept the total readable while exposing each voltage rail as its own stacked segment.
